name: player_weight crafted year_offset range returns each player's own weight, not the cross-player SUM (executed-result parity)
description: Seed two players (weights 200 and 300). Before the year-less-source guard, a crafted year_offset:[1,2] on the base-player column emitted (SELECT SUM(player.weight) FROM player WHERE player.pid = player.pid) -- a self-join tautology summing weight over EVERY player (so both rows showed the same giant total). The guard renders the plain per-row value, so each player shows its own weight.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."weight" AS "weight_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."weight", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year, weight) VALUES ('TEST-WGTA-000923', 'Test', 'Wgta', 'T.Wgta', 'Test Wgta', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 200)

INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year, weight) VALUES ('TEST-WGTB-000924', 'Test', 'Wgtb', 'T.Wgtb', 'Test Wgtb', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 300)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT weight AS weight_0 FROM player WHERE pos = 'ZZ'
